name: Block Craft 3D School
description: Welcome to Block Craft 3D-School. Here creativity meets adventure! In this pixel-style game, you will enter a world of endless possibilities, like Minecraft. To build and protect your school using blocks of various shapes! But be careful that this isnt just a building game! Enemies hide anywhere and are ready to hit you! Besides, collect and place blocks.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
